rows.failure_mode: Chat UI freezes mid-intake conversation
failure_effects: Session state may still be live server-side; confusing resume
rows.possible_cause: Client bundle memory leak after N streaming tokens
rows.corrective_action: Implement chunk discard after render; add idle memory profiler; cap client-side retained tokens at 16k.
rows.troubleshooting: Check client memory in DevTools; reload; filed ticket captures last token index.

rows.failure_mode: Chat UI freezes mid-intake conversation
failure_effects: Session state may still be live server-side; confusing resume
rows.possible_cause: SSE stream from BFF stops emitting without close event
rows.corrective_action: Client-side SSE heartbeat with 15s watchdog + auto-reconnect; server emits periodic keep-alive.
rows.troubleshooting: Heartbeat dropout surfaces toast; reconnect resumes stream.

rows.failure_mode: Quick Start dialog fails to render final spec
failure_effects: Credit deducted but output not visible
rows.possible_cause: Streaming payload exceeds client JSON parse buffer
rows.corrective_action: Switch to incremental JSON parser; add max-payload guard and streaming error surface.
rows.troubleshooting: Dashboard shows last 3 steps; founder can resume from partial or request refund.

rows.failure_mode: Session mode (cloud/local) mutates mid-session
failure_effects: Wrong provider fan-out across up to 5 parallel agents
rows.possible_cause: Race: user clicks 'switch to Privacy Local' after IF-03 already dispatched
rows.corrective_action: Lock mode at session boot; mid-session mode change forces new session (explicit founder prompt).
rows.troubleshooting: Audit log (SS14) records mode transitions; alert fires if mode changes between IF-09 ack and IF-03.

rows.failure_mode: Session mode (cloud/local) mutates mid-session
failure_effects: Wrong provider fan-out across up to 5 parallel agents
rows.possible_cause: IF-03 dispatch fires before IF-09 ack confirming mode (race)
rows.corrective_action: Two-phase commit: IF-03 blocks on IF-09 ack with 2s timeout; on timeout, reject dispatch and retry.
rows.troubleshooting: Without fix this is near-silent; with fix, dispatch reject + retry surfaces in logs.

rows.failure_mode: Session state not persisted across dashboard reload
rows.possible_cause: Session cookie refresh race with Supabase write
rows.corrective_action: Idempotency keys on session ops; persistent sessionId in Postgres before cookie write.
rows.troubleshooting: Session restore banner; last-message replay; credit-refund on duplicate detection.

rows.failure_mode: Not all parallel agents in fan-out complete
failure_effects: Spec generation proceeds on incomplete agent output
rows.possible_cause: One of 5 parallel agents hits LLM timeout (IF-08) and no retry
rows.corrective_action: All-or-nothing join at orchestrator; automatic retry with exponential backoff; surface partial to founder as 'Waiting for agent N...'.
rows.troubleshooting: Agent-result log shows per-agent status; founder can re-run failing agent only.

rows.failure_mode: Agent context exceeds EC8=8000 tokens silently
rows.possible_cause: Token counter drifts from provider's tokenizer on long threads
rows.corrective_action: Use provider-native tokenizer; hard-reject >7600 token contexts at orchestrator with summarization fallback.
rows.troubleshooting: Log token count per IF-07 call; alert on > EC8 * 0.95 within any call.

rows.failure_mode: Orchestrator cannot recover when LLM chain (SS4) fully fails
rows.possible_cause: Both primary and fallback providers down simultaneously (SS4_PROVIDER_FALLBACK_DEPTH=2)
rows.corrective_action: Promote SS4_PROVIDER_FALLBACK_DEPTH to 3; circuit breaker returns friendly error + credit hold after 30s.
rows.troubleshooting: Error banner; auto-credit hold; status page link.

rows.failure_mode: Primary provider outage + fallback depth=2 insufficient
rows.possible_cause: Anthropic + secondary both degraded in same region
rows.corrective_action: Add 3rd provider (OpenAI GPT-4.6 class); multi-region routing; daily provider-health probe.
rows.troubleshooting: Status page shows provider state; fallback depth surfaced in metric dashboard.

rows.failure_mode: Streaming chunk cadence misses EC16=50ms
rows.possible_cause: Provider-side backpressure during high-load windows
rows.corrective_action: Client-side token buffering (40ms); surface 'Provider slow' toast when cadence > 200ms sustained.
rows.troubleshooting: p95 cadence dashboard; founder toast on slow stream.

rows.failure_mode: Malformed tool-call payload from provider
failure_effects: Agent retry storm if not gated
rows.possible_cause: Provider model upgrade changes tool-call schema silently
rows.corrective_action: Strict JSON-schema validation on IF-08; version-pinned provider model; retry-once then fail loud.
rows.troubleshooting: Schema-mismatch log; provider-model-drift alert on first occurrence.

rows.failure_mode: Cache hit returns stale template
rows.possible_cause: Template revision deployed but cache keys not invalidated
rows.corrective_action: Hash-derived cache keys (template_sha + model_id + context_hash); mandatory invalidation hook on deploy.
rows.troubleshooting: Template version in every agent output; mismatch alarm at CI deploy.

rows.failure_mode: Cache miss storm on cold start
failure_effects: EC7=70% hit rate target breached temporarily
rows.possible_cause: Cold node restart + concurrent founder sessions
rows.corrective_action: Warm-up script on deploy; staggered worker rollout; pre-compute top-20 template hashes.
rows.troubleshooting: Cache hit-rate dashboard; warm-up completion metric.

rows.failure_mode: Spec emitted without all required citations (EC10=100% floor violation)
rows.possible_cause: Citation-check gate bypassed on timeout (IF-12 returns 'unknown' treated as pass)
rows.corrective_action: IF-12 timeout MUST fail-closed (reject spec); raise CITATION_CHECK_LATENCY_MAX_S to 5 with hard reject on exceed.
rows.troubleshooting: Audit-log every citation-gate decision; weekly sampling review flags fail-open anomalies.

rows.failure_mode: Spec emitted without all required citations (EC10=100% floor violation)
rows.possible_cause: Citation-check logic contains false-positive due to partial match heuristic
rows.corrective_action: Exact-match + signed-content-hash check in citation gate; reject on any hash drift.
rows.troubleshooting: Nightly replay of 100 random specs against gold-set; red-team sampling.

rows.failure_mode: Partial spec streamed as valid
rows.possible_cause: Generator streams chunks but aborts without sentinel
rows.corrective_action: Require spec-complete sentinel; IF-15 emit conditional on sentinel + hash match.
rows.troubleshooting: UI shows spec progress bar; hash mismatch blocks CLI emit.

rows.failure_mode: Stale citation served (invalidation event lost)
rows.possible_cause: Fetcher write races cache read; invalidate event dropped on SS7 internal bus
rows.corrective_action: Transactional invalidate (cache + fetcher in single TX); outbox pattern with retry; monotonic source_uri version counter.
rows.troubleshooting: Every citation stamped with source_version; SS12 warn on stale version served.

rows.failure_mode: Stale citation served (invalidation event lost)
rows.possible_cause: TTL_HOURS=24 permits drift during weekly refresh window (EC11=7d)
rows.corrective_action: Reduce TRACEBACK_CACHE_TTL_HOURS to 6 for top-50 most-cited sources; event-driven refresh (webhook) where vendor supports.
rows.troubleshooting: Source_version comparison on every read; diff-detector alerts on >5% citation drift.

rows.failure_mode: Doc fetcher upstream outage
failure_effects: Citation queries return empty or stale
rows.possible_cause: Vendor doc host returns 500 during scheduled refresh
rows.corrective_action: Serve last-known-good (stamped 'stale, x hrs') with founder warning; auto-retry on exponential backoff.
rows.troubleshooting: Status page 'vendor docs degraded'; founder sees 'citation freshness: 2h stale'.

rows.failure_mode: Citation cache miss storm during refresh
rows.possible_cause: Scheduled refresh invalidates large batch of entries simultaneously
rows.corrective_action: Staggered refresh with 10% jitter; stampede protection (singleflight).
rows.troubleshooting: Cache-miss heatmap dashboard; refresh schedule spread over 60 min.

rows.failure_mode: Citation returned for wrong source_uri (key collision)
failure_effects: EC10 floor appears met but is false
rows.possible_cause: Hash function collision between vendor doc paths
rows.corrective_action: Composite key (source_uri + sha256 of full URL); probabilistic bound below 1/10^12 collision.
rows.troubleshooting: Stored citation payload includes full URL; round-trip verification on hot paths.

rows.failure_mode: CLI push succeeds but audit receipt (IF-16 → IF-25) lost
rows.possible_cause: Async audit write (AUDIT_WRITE_POLICY=best-effort) drops under backpressure
rows.corrective_action: Upgrade CLI-emit audit writes to synchronous-durable (blocking); async retained only for probe/telemetry writes (see F.30).
rows.troubleshooting: Compliance dashboard counts CLI emits vs. audit rows; daily reconciliation.

rows.failure_mode: CLI push succeeds but audit receipt (IF-16 → IF-25) lost
rows.possible_cause: VCS push succeeds but webhook-ack not received → audit row is labeled 'unconfirmed'
rows.corrective_action: Poll VCS for commit SHA confirmation if webhook absent after 30s; update audit row on reconciliation.
rows.troubleshooting: Audit row shows 'pending SHA' state; reconciled within 2 min.

rows.failure_mode: CLI bundle exceeds CLI_BUNDLE_SIZE_MB_MAX=5 silently
rows.possible_cause: Large spec with many artifacts; no pre-flight size check
rows.corrective_action: Pre-emit size check; offer founder to trim or chunk into multi-push.
rows.troubleshooting: Size shown in UI before emit; blocking toast if over limit.

rows.failure_mode: VCS signer key revoked during emission
rows.possible_cause: Credential rotation race with active emission
rows.corrective_action: Lock signer key for duration of emission; rotation waits on in-flight ops (max 60s).
rows.troubleshooting: Rotation dashboard; failed-push queue with auto-retry.

rows.failure_mode: Probe exceeds MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT=2% silently
failure_effects: Customer-system SLO violation caused by c1v
rows.possible_cause: IF-18 backpressure ack lost; SS10 never tells SDK to throttle
rows.corrective_action: SDK-side self-governor: measures local overhead, auto-throttles if SS10 silent for 2*AGGREGATION_WINDOW; kill-switch at 2%.
rows.troubleshooting: SDK emits heartbeat with local overhead%; customer-side alert on > 1.5%.

rows.failure_mode: Probe exceeds MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT=2% silently
failure_effects: Customer-system SLO violation caused by c1v
rows.possible_cause: PROBE_FREQUENCY_PER_MIN=6 interacts with high-churn customer workload
rows.corrective_action: Adaptive probe frequency: SDK reduces to 3/min if local CPU > 70%; ramps back when clear.
rows.troubleshooting: Overhead metric per customer deployment; weekly audit report.

rows.failure_mode: SDK writes to customer system (non-invasiveness / UC11 violation)
rows.possible_cause: IF-30 delivers write-scope credential in error
rows.corrective_action: SDK enforces read-only at SQL/driver layer regardless of credential scope; fail-closed on any write attempt; SBOM-signed SDK binary.
rows.troubleshooting: SDK panics on any write attempt; emergency incident process.

rows.failure_mode: SDK writes to customer system (non-invasiveness / UC11 violation)
rows.possible_cause: Debug/test code path accidentally shipped with write capability
rows.corrective_action: Release-build excludes all write syscalls via compile-time feature flag; linter CI gate.
rows.troubleshooting: SBOM diff on every release; customer-deploy verifies signed read-only variant.

rows.failure_mode: Credential leak into customer-visible logs
rows.possible_cause: Error stack includes credential in URI
rows.corrective_action: Credential redaction middleware in SDK log pipeline; structured error without raw URI.
rows.troubleshooting: Log-scanner grep for credential pattern in customer deployments.

rows.failure_mode: Collector crashes mid-aggregation-window (AGGREGATION_WINDOW_MIN=60)
rows.possible_cause: OOM from oversized batches
rows.corrective_action: Memory-bounded batches; periodic checkpoint-to-disk every 10 min; kubelet restart with state recovery.
rows.troubleshooting: Collector health dashboard; crash alert within 30s.

rows.failure_mode: Batch never flushes (FLUSH_FALLBACK_BATCH_MIN=10 wrong)
rows.possible_cause: Low-traffic customer; batch never reaches 10 before window ends and fallback min set too high
rows.corrective_action: Sensitivity analysis on FLUSH_FALLBACK_BATCH_MIN; adjust to 3 for low-traffic tier; add time-bound flush (15 min absolute).
rows.troubleshooting: Age-of-oldest-pending metric gauge; alert at 20 min.

rows.failure_mode: Backpressure reject-on-violation event lost
rows.possible_cause: IF-18 payload dropped in transport
rows.corrective_action: Idempotent backpressure messages with monotonic sequence + SDK-side ack; retry-until-acked with exponential backoff.
rows.troubleshooting: Unacked-backpressure-count metric; alert on > 3 outstanding.

rows.failure_mode: Metric write lost (IF-19) under burst
rows.possible_cause: SS10 → SS11 write timeout; no retry
rows.corrective_action: Local buffer on SS10 with write-ahead log; retry with jitter; reconciler job at 60 min.
rows.troubleshooting: Write-success ratio panel; gaps auto-filled with last value + 'interpolated' flag.

rows.failure_mode: Retention truncates data before EC18 window elapses
rows.possible_cause: Retention policy misconfigured
rows.corrective_action: Retention policy as code; weekly CI diff; retention alarm if records < threshold.
rows.troubleshooting: Retention-count dashboard; daily comparison against EC18 window.

rows.failure_mode: Recommendation cites stale traceback (from F.15 adjacency)
rows.possible_cause: SS12 reads SS7 without source_version check
rows.corrective_action: All SS12 reads require source_version token; stale responses explicitly flagged to founder.
rows.troubleshooting: Every recommendation includes 'citation-as-of' timestamp; warn if > 24h.

rows.failure_mode: Infinite IF-22/IF-23 cycle
rows.possible_cause: SS3 re-triggers SS12 without bounded iteration counter
rows.corrective_action: Hard cap at 3 iterations per session; circuit-breaker opens on exceed; founder-visible notice.
rows.troubleshooting: Iteration-count metric per session; breaker state in dashboard.

rows.failure_mode: Credential rotation while session actively using old credential
rows.possible_cause: CREDENTIAL_ROTATION_DAYS=90 rotation runs against active session
rows.corrective_action: Grace window: old credential accepted for 15 min after rotation; session middleware auto-refreshes.
rows.troubleshooting: 401 on refresh is auto-retried; transparent to founder.

rows.failure_mode: Vault returns write-scope grant when read-only requested (F.23 cause adjacency)
rows.possible_cause: Scope enum off-by-one in new credential policy
rows.corrective_action: Policy-as-code with unit tests for every scope; deny-by-default; mandatory code review gate for policy files.
rows.troubleshooting: Policy diff review; canary deploy with scope-assertion in integration tests.

rows.failure_mode: Audit event dropped under backpressure (F.19 adjacency)
rows.possible_cause: Best-effort async writes lose events when audit store is saturated
rows.corrective_action: Synchronous-durable writes for compliance-critical events (auth, CLI emit, spec emit); best-effort retained only for telemetry.
rows.troubleshooting: Audit-write success ratio dashboard; dropped-event counter alert.

rows.failure_mode: JSONL schema mismatch after retention migration
rows.possible_cause: Migration changes field type without versioning
rows.corrective_action: Schema version field on every record; migration tests against gold-set; compatibility layer reads N and N-1 versions.
rows.troubleshooting: Audit-reader CI run against every migration; schema-diff report.
